title: Feb 2026 – Present — Research Scientist, Typhoon team (SCB DataX R&I)
description: Advise fellow research scientists on language model research, support internal knowledge sharing, and help connect agentic AI work to product and strategy decisions.

title: 2025 — Typhoon Application Week
description: Built and shipped more than seven LLM-powered applications in a rapid prototyping sprint.

title: 2025 — Typhoon T1 (research preview)

title: Sep 2024 — M.Eng., Ritsumeikan University (Valedictorian)
